items.summary: Positioned as a senior automotive operator focused on performance across sales, service, parts, customer process, team development, and systems-backed operational improvement.
highlights: Aligns process improvement with real dealership execution rather than abstract transformation language.
Builds standards and management routines that improve accountability, coaching, and customer follow-through.
Bridges leadership priorities across revenue operations, fixed operations, and staff enablement.

items.summary: Led dealership operational performance with emphasis on process consistency, customer experience, team execution, and stronger management discipline.
highlights: Improved workflow alignment across front-end and fixed operations touchpoints.
Supported managers through clearer expectations, better reporting habits, and repeatable operating cadence.
Advanced collaboration between departments that often function in isolation.

items.summary: Developed a strong perspective on service workflow, customer communication, and the operating systems required to improve consistency inside fixed operations environments.
highlights: Focused on customer updates, process discipline, and operational follow-up.
Contributed to service workflow improvement and stronger accountability structures.
Built insight into how frontline execution affects broader dealership performance.

items.role: Sales, CRM, and Customer Process Experience
items.summary: Built hands-on knowledge around lead management, CRM discipline, customer engagement, and the systems required to support consistent team performance.
highlights: Strengthened understanding of the revenue side of dealership operations.
Developed appreciation for structured follow-up, pipeline management, and customer communication standards.
Created the foundation for later systems and training-focused leadership work.
